---
title: "BCB420 - Basic R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
set.seed(420)

mat <- matrix(sample(1:100, 50, replace = TRUE), nrow = 5, ncol = 10)

colnames(mat) <- c("cond1","cond2","cond3","cond4","cond5",
                   "ctrl1","ctrl2","ctrl3","ctrl4","ctrl5")

rownames(mat) <- paste0("gene", 1:5)

mat
